info.title: OAuth 2.1
info.description: Endpoints for registering applications and managing OAuth 2.1 tokens.

post.description: Register a new OAuth app. Credentials are sent by email.

400.description: Invalid or unparseable JSON body. Error code: `bad_request`. Message: `"Request body must be valid JSON."`

error.message: Request body must be valid JSON.

409.description: Email already registered to another app. Error code: `conflict`. Message: `"An app is already registered with this email address."`

error.message: An app is already registered with this email address.

500.description: Failed to create or persist the app. Error code: `internal_error`. Message: `"An unexpected error occurred."` Use the `request_id` to correlate with server-side logs.

delete.description: Permanently deletes an OAuth app and all associated data, including active user sessions. This action is irreversible.

400.description: Invalid or unparseable JSON body. Error code: `bad_request`. Message: `"Request body must be valid JSON."`

error.message: Request body must be valid JSON.

401.description: Email or client_secret does not match the registered app. Error code: `invalid_client`. Message: `"Invalid client credentials."`

404.description: App not found or already deleted. Error code: `not_found`. Message: `"App not found."`

422.description: Input validation failed. Error code: `validation_error`. Message: `"Validation failed."` The `fields` object maps each invalid field to a description of the problem.

500.description: Failed to delete the app. Error code: `internal_error`. Message: `"An unexpected error occurred."` Use the `request_id` to correlate with server-side logs.

post.description: Issues a new client_secret and immediately invalidates the previous one. The client_id stays the same. Active user tokens are not affected.

200.description: Credentials rotated successfully. New credentials sent by email.

400.description: Invalid or unparseable JSON body. Error code: `bad_request`. Message: `"Request body must be valid JSON."`

error.message: Request body must be valid JSON.

401.description: Email does not match the one registered with the app. Error code: `invalid_client`. Message: `"Invalid client credentials."`

404.description: App not found or revoked. Error code: `not_found`. Message: `"App not found."`

500.description: Failed to rotate or persist the credentials. Error code: `internal_error`. Message: `"An unexpected error occurred."` Use the `request_id` to correlate with server-side logs.

get.description: Redirects the user's browser to the Vendaze consent screen. **This endpoint must be opened in a browser. do not call it with fetch, axios, or any HTTP client.** The user must navigate to this URL so they can log in and approve access. Scopes are resolved from the app registration.

parameters.name: redirect_uri
parameters.description: Redirect URI registered with the application.

parameters.name: state
parameters.description: Random string you generate. Returned unchanged in the callback. Strongly recommended to prevent CSRF attacks.

302.description: Redirect to the Vendaze consent screen.

400.description: Invalid or missing parameter. Possible error codes: `invalid_request` (missing required parameter. message identifies which one, e.g. `"Missing required parameter: redirect_uri."`), `unsupported_response_type` (`response_type` is not `code`. message: `"response_type must be \"code\"."`), `invalid_request` (`redirect_uri` not registered. message: `"redirect_uri does not match any registered URI."`).

401.description: App not found or inactive. Error code: `invalid_client`. Message: `"Invalid client credentials."`

500.description: Authorization service unavailable. Error code: `internal_error`. Message: `"An unexpected error occurred."` Retry the request.

post.description: Exchange an authorization code for tokens, or refresh an access token using a refresh token. Accepts application/x-www-form-urlencoded (recommended) or application/json.

400.description: Invalid or missing parameter. Possible error codes: `bad_request` (malformed body or unsupported Content-Type), `unsupported_grant_type` (`grant_type` is not `authorization_code` or `refresh_token`), `invalid_request` (missing required parameter for the given `grant_type`), `invalid_grant` (authorization code is invalid, expired, already used, or does not match).

error.message: The provided authorization grant is invalid, expired, or does not match.

500.description: Token exchange failed. The authorization server was unavailable or returned an unexpected response. Retry the request.

post.description: Revoke an access token or refresh token. Returns 200 even if already revoked.

200.description: Token revoked. Also returned if the token was already revoked or expired.

400.description: Invalid or missing parameter. Possible error codes: `bad_request` (malformed JSON body), `invalid_request` (missing `token`, `client_id`, or `client_secret`; or `token` is not a valid access token. refresh tokens are not accepted).

500.description: An unexpected error occurred during credential validation.

get.description: Verifies if the provided access_token is valid and returns the authentication data of the logged-in app and user. Useful for integrators to check token validity.

Returns a paginated list of people in the workspace.

<Accordion title="Required scope">
`people:read`
</Accordion>

parameters.name: per_page
parameters.description: Number of records per page. Maximum: 50.

parameters.name: email
parameters.description: Filter by email address (exact match). Searches across all emails on the contact.

parameters.name: company_id
parameters.description: Filter by company UUID. Returns only people linked to this company.

parameters.name: created_after
parameters.description: Return records created on or after this ISO 8601 date.

parameters.name: created_before
parameters.description: Return records created on or before this ISO 8601 date.

parameters.name: updated_after
parameters.description: Return records updated on or after this ISO 8601 date.

parameters.name: updated_before
parameters.description: Return records updated on or before this ISO 8601 date.

post.description:
Creates a new person in the workspace.

<Accordion title="Required scope">
`people:write`
</Accordion>

get.description:
Returns the person corresponding to the ID.

<Accordion title="Required scope">
`people:read`
</Accordion>

patch.description:
Updates a person. Only the submitted fields are modified.

<Accordion title="Required scope">
`people:write`
</Accordion>

delete.description:
Soft-deletes a person. The record is no longer accessible via the API.

<Accordion title="Required scope">
`people:write`
</Accordion>

get.description:
Returns a paginated list of companies in the workspace.

<Accordion title="Required scope">
`companies:read`
</Accordion>

parameters.name: per_page
parameters.description: Number of records per page. Maximum: 50.

parameters.name: email
parameters.description: Filter by email address (exact match). Searches across all emails on the company.

parameters.name: created_after
parameters.description: Return records created on or after this ISO 8601 date.

parameters.name: created_before
parameters.description: Return records created on or before this ISO 8601 date.

parameters.name: updated_after
parameters.description: Return records updated on or after this ISO 8601 date.

parameters.name: updated_before
parameters.description: Return records updated on or before this ISO 8601 date.

post.description:
Creates a new company in the workspace.

<Accordion title="Required scope">
`companies:write`
</Accordion>

get.description:
Returns the company corresponding to the ID.

<Accordion title="Required scope">
`companies:read`
</Accordion>

patch.description:
Updates a company. Only the fields sent in the body are modified.

<Accordion title="Required scope">
`companies:write`
</Accordion>

delete.description:
Soft-deletes a company. The record is no longer accessible via the API.

<Accordion title="Required scope">
`companies:write`
</Accordion>

get.description:
Returns a paginated list of deals in the workspace.

<Accordion title="Required scope">
`deals:read`
</Accordion>

parameters.name: per_page
parameters.description: Number of records per page. Maximum: 100.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Filter by deal name (case-insensitive partial match).

parameters.name: source
parameters.description: Filter by source (exact match). The source is the name of the OAuth app that created the deal.

parameters.name: forecast_after
parameters.description: Filter deals with forecast_date on or after this date (ISO 8601).

parameters.name: forecast_before
parameters.description: Filter deals with forecast_date on or before this date (ISO 8601).

parameters.name: created_after
parameters.description: Filter deals created on or after this date (ISO 8601).

parameters.name: created_before
parameters.description: Filter deals created on or before this date (ISO 8601).

parameters.name: updated_after
parameters.description: Filter deals updated on or after this date (ISO 8601).

parameters.name: updated_before
parameters.description: Filter deals updated on or before this date (ISO 8601).

post.description:
Creates a new deal in the workspace.

<Accordion title="Required scope">
`deals:write`
</Accordion>

400.description: Invalid or unparseable JSON body. Error code: `bad_request`. Message: `"Request body must be valid JSON."`

error.message: Request body must be valid JSON.

get.description:
Returns the deal corresponding to the ID.

<Accordion title="Required scope">
`deals:read`
</Accordion>

patch.description:
Updates a deal. Only the fields sent are modified.

<Accordion title="Required scope">
`deals:write`
</Accordion>

400.description: Invalid or unparseable JSON body. Error code: `bad_request`. Message: `"Request body must be valid JSON."` For PATCH with no fields: code `bad_request`, message `"No fields provided for update."`

delete.description:
Soft-delete: the record is no longer accessible via the API.

<Accordion title="Required scope">
`deals:write`
</Accordion>

parameters.description: Number of records per page. Maximum: 100.

Creates a new pipeline with its stages.

<Accordion title="Required scope">
`deals:write`
</Accordion>

Returns the pipeline corresponding to the ID, including all its stages.

<Accordion title="Required scope">

</Accordion>

Updates a pipeline. Only the fields sent are modified.

400.description: Invalid or unparseable JSON body. Error code: `bad_request`. Message: `"Request body must be valid JSON."` For PATCH with no fields: code `bad_request`, message `"No fields provided for update."`

parameters.name: created_after

parameters.name: created_before

Creates a new task in the workspace.

`tasks:write`
</Accordion>

patch.description:
Updates a task. Only the fields sent in the body are modified.

Permanently deletes a task. This operation is irreversible. Tasks do not support soft delete.

<Accordion title="Required scope">
`tasks:write`
</Accordion>

<Accordion title="Required scope">
`tasks:read`

parameters.description: Number of records per page. Maximum: 50.

parameters.description: Filter by task type title (case-insensitive contains).

Creates a new task type in the workspace.

<Accordion title="Required scope">
`tasks:write`
</Accordion>

patch.description:
Updates a task type. Only fields included in the body are modified.

<Accordion title="Required scope">
`tasks:write`
</Accordion>

delete.description:

<Accordion title="Required scope">
`tasks:write`

get.description:
Returns a paginated list of workspace activities.

<Accordion title="Required scope">
`activities:read`
</Accordion>

parameters.name: per_page
parameters.description: Number of records per page. Maximum: 100.

parameters.name: entity
parameters.description: Type of the linked entity. Must be `people`, `companies`, or `deals`.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: UUID of the entity specified in `entity`.

parameters.name: created_after
parameters.description: Return activities created on or after this ISO 8601 date.

parameters.name: created_before
parameters.description: Return activities created on or before this ISO 8601 date.

data.content_html: Meeting held. Client confirmed interest in the Enterprise plan.

post.description:
Creates a new activity in the workspace.

<Accordion title="Required scope">
`activities:write`
</Accordion>

get.description:
Returns an activity by its UUID.

<Accordion title="Required scope">
`activities:read`
</Accordion>

patch.description:
Updates an activity. Only the fields sent in the body are modified.

<Accordion title="Required scope">
`activities:write`
</Accordion>

delete.description:
Permanently deletes an activity and all its attached files from storage.

<Accordion title="Required scope">
`activities:write`
</Accordion>

get.description:
Returns a paginated list of products in the workspace.

<Accordion title="Required scope">
`products:read`

parameters.description: Number of records per page. Maximum: 50.

Creates a new product in the workspace.

<Accordion title="Required scope">
`products:write`
</Accordion>

<Accordion title="Required scope">

</Accordion>

`products:write`
</Accordion>

delete.description:

<Accordion title="Required scope">
`products:write`
</Accordion>

<Accordion title="Required scope">

Creates a new tag in the workspace.

<Accordion title="Required scope">
`tags:write`
</Accordion>

<Accordion title="Required scope">
`tags:read`
</Accordion>

patch.description:
Updates a tag by its `id` (UUID) or `key` (string). Only fields included in the body are modified.

<Accordion title="Required scope">
`tags:write`
</Accordion>

delete.description:
Soft-deletes a tag by its `id` (UUID) or `key` (string).

<Accordion title="Required scope">

parameters.description: Number of records per page. Maximum: 50.

<Accordion title="Required scope">
`lists:write`
</Accordion>

Updates a contact list. Only fields included in the body are modified.

`lists:write`

get.description:

<Accordion title="Required scope">

parameters.description: Number of records per page. Maximum: 50.

parameters.name: show_people
parameters.description: Filter fields that appear on people records.

parameters.name: show_companies
parameters.description: Filter fields that appear on company records.

parameters.name: show_deals
parameters.description: Filter fields that appear on deal records.

post.description:
Creates a new custom field in the workspace.

For `select` and `multi_select` types, pass the available options in `value` as an array of strings.

<Accordion title="Required scope">
`custom_fields:write`
</Accordion>

patch.description:
Updates a custom field by its `id` (UUID) or `key` (string). Only fields included in the body are modified.

<Accordion title="Required scope">
`custom_fields:write`
</Accordion>

delete.description:
Soft-deletes a custom field by its `id` (UUID) or `key` (string).

<Accordion title="Required scope">
`custom_fields:write`
</Accordion>

get.description:
Returns a paginated list of webhooks created by your integration. Webhooks created in the dashboard are not included.

<Accordion title="Required scope">
`webhooks:manage`
</Accordion>

parameters.name: per_page
parameters.description: Number of records per page. Maximum: 100.

post.description:
Creates a new webhook.

<Accordion title="Required scope">
`webhooks:manage`
</Accordion>

get.description:
Returns a webhook by ID.

<Accordion title="Required scope">
`webhooks:manage`
</Accordion>

patch.description:
Updates a webhook. Only fields included in the body are modified.

<Accordion title="Required scope">
`webhooks:manage`
</Accordion>

delete.description:
Permanently deletes a webhook.

<Accordion title="Required scope">
`webhooks:manage`
</Accordion>

identifier.name: identifier
identifier.description: Custom field `id` (UUID) or `key` (string). Both formats are accepted.

Unauthorized.description: Token missing, invalid, or expired. Possible error codes: `unauthorized`, `token_expired`.

InsufficientScope.description: Token lacks the required scope. Error code: `insufficient_scope`.

NotFound.description: Webhook not found or belongs to another integration. Error code: `not_found`. Message: `"Webhook not found."`

ValidationError.description: Input validation failed. Error code: `validation_error`. The `fields` object maps each invalid field to a description of the problem.

fields.events: At least one event is required.

error.message: Rate limit exceeded. Try again in 60 seconds.

BadRequest.description: Malformed request body or empty update. Error code: `bad_request`.

error.message: Request body must be valid JSON.

Conflict.description: A custom field with the same `key` already exists. Error code: `conflict`.

error.message: A record with this value already exists.

key.description: Unique key within the workspace. Lowercase letters, digits, and underscores only (e.g. `hot_lead`). Used to reference the tag in association arrays.

color_text.description: Text color in hex RGB format. `null` means the workspace default is applied.

color_background.description: Background color in hex RGB format. `null` means the workspace default is applied.

created_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of when the tag was created.

email.description: The API never reveals which email is on file.

description.example: Integration with Vendaze to sync contacts.

avatar_image.description: Public HTTPS URL or full base64 data URI of your app logo (e.g. `data:image/png;base64,...`). Accepted formats: JPEG, PNG, WebP, GIF, BMP, TIFF. Max 2MB.

scopes.description: Scopes your app needs. Users approve them individually on the consent screen.

avatar_url.description: Public URL of the stored avatar. Only present if avatar_image was provided in the request.

client_id.description: Current client_id of the app being rotated.

email.description: Email address registered with the app. Used to verify ownership. The API never reveals which email is on file.

app_name.description: New name shown to users on the consent screen. Max 100 chars. If omitted, the current name is kept.

description.description: New description of what your app does. Max 500 chars. If omitted, the current description is kept.

avatar_image.description: Public HTTPS URL or full base64 data URI of your app logo (e.g. `data:image/png;base64,...`). Accepted formats: JPEG, PNG, WebP, GIF, BMP, TIFF. If omitted, the current avatar is kept.

redirect_uris.description: New list of HTTPS redirect URIs. Replaces the previous list entirely. If omitted, the current list is kept.

client_id.description: The app's client_id. Does not change after rotation.

avatar_url.description: Public URL of the stored avatar. Only present if avatar_image was provided in the request.

workspace_slug.description: Slug of the workspace the user authorized. Use this to identify the connected account in your app.

token.description: The access_token (JWT) to revoke. Must be the access_token, not the refresh_token.

Owner.description: Workspace member responsible for this activity. `null` when no owner is assigned.

owner_email.description: Email of the workspace member to set as owner. The API resolves it to the internal user ID. Must be a member of this workspace.

avatar_image.description: Public HTTPS URL or full base64 data URI of the image (e.g. `data:image/png;base64,...`). Accepted formats: JPEG, PNG, WebP, GIF, BMP, TIFF.

tags.description: Tag names (keys) to associate with the person. If a tag doesn't exist, it will be automatically created.

list_ids.description: List IDs to associate with the person.

field_key.description: Key of the custom field (e.g. `lead_source`). If no field with this key exists in the workspace, it is created automatically with type `text`.

custom_fields.description: Custom field values to set for the person. Identified by `field_key`. If the field does not exist, it is created automatically with type `text`.

UpdatePersonRequest.description: All fields are optional. Only fields included in the body are modified.

company_id.description: Pass `null` to remove the company association.

position.description: Pass `null` to clear the job title.

owner_email.description: Email of the workspace member to set as owner. Pass `null` to remove the owner. Must be a member of this workspace.

avatar_image.description: Public HTTPS URL or full base64 data URI of the image (e.g. `data:image/png;base64,...`). Replaces the current avatar. Accepted formats: JPEG, PNG, WebP, GIF, BMP, TIFF.

tags.description: Tag names (keys) to associate. Behavior depends on `association_mode`. If a tag doesn't exist, it will be automatically created.

list_ids.description: List IDs to associate. Behavior depends on `association_mode`.

field_key.description: Key of the custom field (e.g. `lead_source`). If no field with this key exists in the workspace, it is created automatically with type `text`.

custom_fields.description: Custom field values. Behavior depends on `association_mode`. In `append` mode, replaces the value for each `field_key` sent without touching others.

association_mode.description: Controls how associations (`tags`, `list_ids`, `custom_fields`) are applied. `append`: adds new associations without removing existing ones. `replace`: removes all current associations of each sent type and inserts the new ones. Sending an empty array with `replace` removes all associations of that type.

PersonList.description: Compact person object returned in list responses.

owner_email.description: Email of the workspace member to set as owner. The API resolves it to the internal user ID. Must be a member of this workspace.

avatar_image.description: Public HTTPS URL or full base64 data URI of the image (e.g. `data:image/png;base64,...`). Accepted formats: JPEG, PNG, WebP, GIF, BMP, TIFF.

tags.description: Tag names (keys) to associate with the company. If a tag doesn't exist, it will be automatically created.

list_ids.description: List IDs to associate with the company.

field_key.description: Key of the custom field (e.g. `industry`). If no field with this key exists in the workspace, it is created automatically with type `text`.

custom_fields.description: Custom field values to set for the company. Identified by `field_key`. If the field does not exist, it is created automatically with type `text`.

UpdateCompanyRequest.description: All fields are optional. Only fields included in the body are modified.

owner_email.description: Email of the workspace member to set as owner. Pass `null` to remove the owner. Must be a member of this workspace.

avatar_image.description: Public HTTPS URL or full base64 data URI of the image (e.g. `data:image/png;base64,...`). Replaces the current avatar. Accepted formats: JPEG, PNG, WebP, GIF, BMP, TIFF.

tags.description: Tag names (keys) to associate. Behavior depends on `association_mode`. If a tag doesn't exist, it will be automatically created.

list_ids.description: List IDs to associate. Behavior depends on `association_mode`.

field_key.description: Key of the custom field (e.g. `industry`). If no field with this key exists in the workspace, it is created automatically with type `text`.

custom_fields.description: Custom field values. Behavior depends on `association_mode`. In `append` mode, replaces the value for each `field_key` sent without touching others.

association_mode.description: Controls how associations (`tags`, `list_ids`, `custom_fields`) are applied. `append`: adds new associations without removing existing ones. `replace`: removes all current associations of each sent type and inserts the new ones. Sending an empty array with `replace` removes all associations of that type.

CompanyList.description: Compact company object returned in list responses.

CurrencyCode.description: ISO 4217 currency code supported by Vendaze.

owner_email.description: Email of the workspace member to set as owner.

person_ids.description: People to associate with this deal.

company_ids.description: Companies to associate with this deal.

tags.description: Tag keys to associate with the deal.

custom_fields.description: Custom field values to set for the deal.

owner_email.description: Email of the workspace member to set as owner.

tags.description: Tag keys to associate with the deal.

custom_fields.description: Custom field values to set for the deal.

id.description: Unique identifier of the task type.

title.description: Display name of the task type.

color.description: Display color in hex RGB format.

key.description: Identifier key for the task type. Unique within the workspace. Used in the `type` field when creating or updating tasks.

TaskWithEmbedded.description: Task object returned by POST and PATCH. Includes full embedded objects for person, company, and deal instead of plain IDs.

PersonEmbedded.description: Person associated with the task. `null` when no person is assigned.

CompanyEmbedded.description: Company associated with the task. `null` when no company is assigned.

DealEmbedded.description: Deal associated with the task. `null` when no deal is assigned. Value fields follow the same format as `GET /v1/deals`.

formatted_amount.description: Deal value formatted using the currency's symbol and separators.

due_date.description: ISO 8601 UTC datetime when the task is due.

person_id.description: UUID of the person associated with this task.

company_id.description: UUID of the company associated with this task.

deal_id.description: UUID of the deal associated with this task.

priority.description: Priority level. `null` when no priority is set.

completed.description: `true` when the task has been completed.

due_date.description: ISO 8601 UTC datetime when the task is due.

type.description: Task type `id` (UUID) or `key` (string). The API resolves it to the internal type ID. Use `GET /v1/task-types` to list available types.

person_id.description: UUID of the person to associate with this task.

company_id.description: UUID of the company to associate with this task.

deal_id.description: UUID of the deal to associate with this task.

owner_email.description: Email of the workspace member to set as owner. The API resolves it to the internal user ID.

UpdateTaskRequest.description: All fields are optional. Only fields included in the body are modified. Send `null` to clear a field.

due_date.description: New due date in ISO 8601 UTC.

type.description: Task type `id` (UUID) or `key` (string). Send `null` to remove the type. The API resolves it to the internal type ID.

person_id.description: New person UUID. Send `null` to remove.

company_id.description: New company UUID. Send `null` to remove.

deal_id.description: New deal UUID. Send `null` to remove.

owner_email.description: Email of the new owner. Send `null` to remove the owner.

completed.description: Mark the task as completed or not.

title.description: Display name of the task type.

color.description: Display color in hex RGB format.

key.description: Identifier key for the task type. Unique within the workspace. Lowercase letters, digits, and underscores only. Used in the `type` field when creating or updating tasks.

UpdateTaskTypeRequest.description: All fields are optional. Only fields included in the body are modified.

color.description: New display color in hex RGB format.

url.description: Signed URL valid for 1 hour for direct file download. `null` if URL generation fails.

ActivityFile.description: File to attach to the activity.

content.description: Public HTTPS URL or base64 content of the file.

entity.description: Type of the entity linked to the activity.

content_html.example: Meeting held. Client confirmed interest in the Enterprise plan.

attachments.description: Attached files. Signed URLs are valid for 1 hour.

entity.description: Type of the entity to link the activity to.

id.description: UUID of the entity specified in `entity`.

content_html.example: Meeting held. Client confirmed interest in the Enterprise plan.

owner_email.description: Email of the workspace member to set as owner.

files.description: Files to attach. Maximum of 10 per request, up to 50 MB each.

UpdateActivityRequest.description: All fields are optional. Only fields included in the body are modified.

content_html.description: New HTML content. Send `null` to clear the content.

owner_email.description: Email of the new owner. Send `null` to remove the owner.

files.description: New complete file list. Replaces all existing files. Send `null` to remove all files.

price_cts.description: Price in the smallest currency unit (e.g. cents). `99900` = $999.00.

image_url.description: Public URL of the product image, or `null` if none.

price_cts.description: Price in the smallest currency unit. Defaults to `0`.

is_active.description: Whether the product is active. Defaults to `true`.

image.description: Product image. Accepts a public HTTPS URL, a raw Base64 string, or a full data URI (`data:image/png;base64,...`). Maximum 2 MB.

UpdateProductRequest.description: All fields are optional. Only fields included in the body are modified.

price_cts.description: New price in the smallest currency unit.

code.description: New product code. Send `null` to clear.

image.description: New product image. Replaces the existing one.

key.description: Unique key within the workspace. Lowercase letters, digits, and underscores between words only. No spaces, accents, or other punctuation.

color_text.description: Text color in hex RGB format (e.g. `#ffffff`). Omit to use the workspace default (`#374152`).

color_background.description: Background color in hex RGB format (e.g. `#ef4444`). Omit to use the workspace default (`#e4e6eb`).

UpdateTagRequest.description: All fields are optional. Only fields included in the body are modified.

color_text.description: New text color in hex RGB format. Send `null` to revert to the workspace default.

color_background.description: New background color in hex RGB format. Send `null` to revert to the workspace default.

people_count.description: Number of people currently in the list.

companies_count.description: Number of companies currently in the list.

created_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of when the list was created.

UpdateListRequest.description: All fields are optional. Only fields included in the body are modified.

label.description: Display label shown in the interface.

key.description: Unique key within the workspace. Used to reference the field when associating values with records.

type.description: Field type. Determines the expected value format.

value.description: For `select` and `multi_select` fields only: the available options. `null` for all other field types.

required.description: Whether the field is required when creating or editing a record.

show_people.description: Whether this field appears on people records.

show_companies.description: Whether this field appears on company records.

show_deals.description: Whether this field appears on deal records.

key.description: Unique key within the workspace. Lowercase letters, digits, and underscores between words only.

type.description: Field type. Cannot be changed after the field is created via this parameter, use PATCH to update it.

value.description: Options for `select` and `multi_select` types. Required when `type` is `select` or `multi_select`. Must be omitted for all other field types.

key.description: Unique identifier for the option within the field. Lowercase letters, digits, and underscores only.

option.description: Display text shown to the user.

required.description: Whether the field is required. Defaults to `false`.

show_people.description: Show on people records. Defaults to `true`.

show_companies.description: Show on company records. Defaults to `true`.

show_deals.description: Show on deal records. Defaults to `false`.

UpdateCustomFieldRequest.description: All fields are optional. Only fields included in the body are modified.

value.description: Updates the options for `select` and `multi_select` fields. Replaces the entire existing list. Must be omitted for all other field types.

key.description: Unique identifier for the option. Lowercase letters, digits, and underscores only.

option.description: Display text shown to the user.

auth_enable.description: When `true`, every delivery includes a `Webhook-Signature` header signed with `webhook_secret`.

webhook_secret.description: Present when `auth_enable` is `true`. Use to verify the `Webhook-Signature` header on every delivery. Format: `whsec_` followed by 64 hex characters.

created_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of when the webhook was created.

url.description: HTTPS destination URL. HTTP is not accepted.

events.description: List of events to subscribe to.

auth_enable.description: Enables signed deliveries. When `true`, a `webhook_secret` is generated and returned in the response.

events.description: New list of subscribed events. Replaces the existing list entirely.

auth_enable.description: `false` to `true`: generates a new `webhook_secret`. `true` to `false`: permanently deletes the existing `webhook_secret`. No change: `webhook_secret` is not modified.
